prompt: Add a modal to confirm cancelling a delivery on the deliveries detail page
expected_avoid: Jotai for open/close (overkill — useState is canonical for local toggle)
expected_use: @dash/alert-dialog if framing as destructive confirmation (no overlay-click dismiss)
useState<boolean> for open state local to the page
expected_pattern_ref: Decision tree — Overlays (rules L69-77); Anti-Pattern Catalog 'Custom Modal from scratch' (rules L336); Button anatomy (rules L150-164); Naming divergence Dialog→Modal (rules L139)
context_notes: Cancelling a delivery is destructive — alert-dialog is preferred over modal because alert-dialog blocks overlay-click dismiss. portal-v2 already uses Jotai elsewhere but a single open/close boolean is a local-state case. Confirm button must be destructive tone, not primary.
